en.app.title: MycoGuard Kenya
en.app.tagline: Offline-first aflatoxin prevention and One Health guidance
en.assessment.complete: Complete all modules to compute a result and save it offline.
en.results.no_selection_hint: Start a new assessment or open a saved result from history.
en.results.drivers_none: No high-weight drivers were triggered in this assessment.
en.results.disclaimer: MycoGuard provides risk screening, not lab testing. Always discard mouldy grain from food/feed chains. Do not burn affected material. Follow county public health guidance.
en.history.title: Offline assessment history
en.history.description: Saved results stay on this device through local offline storage so users can reopen them later.
en.history.empty: No assessments have been saved yet. Complete a new assessment to create the first offline record.
en.settings.title: Settings
en.settings.description: Settings are stored locally on this device. MycoGuard does not require an account.
en.settings.language_hint: Toggle English or Kiswahili for the assessment questions and key prompts.
en.settings.clear_confirm: Clear all saved assessments from this device? This cannot be undone.
en.weather.title: Weather mode (offline)
en.weather.description: This is not a live forecast. It is an offline tool: select the weather you observe now and MycoGuard will surface prevention actions that reduce moisture, mould, and re-wetting risk.
en.weather.select_prompt: Select an observed condition above to display a risk banner and recommended practices.
en.weather.seasonal_hint: Use this for planning discussions during extension visits, cooperative meetings, and county trainings.
en.weather.ics_description: Export a calendar file to set reminders on your phone. Works offline.
en.drying.title: Verified drying directory
en.drying.description: Read-only list from the verified directory dataset. If you are offline, you can still read the entries; opening a source link requires connectivity.
en.group.title: Group facilitator mode
en.group.description: Run sequential screenings during a farmer group meeting or training. Each participant assessment can be saved on this device and exported as a summary.
en.group.session_placeholder: e.g., PELUM field school, June visit
en.group.participant_hint: Use a short identifier (name, village, or code). This stays local on the device unless you export it.
en.group.summary_hint: Summary is tabular for quick discussion and reporting.

sw.app.title: MycoGuard Kenya
sw.app.tagline: Mwongozo wa kuzuia aflatoksini na afya moja usiohitaji mtandao
sw.assessment.complete: Kamilisha moduli zote kuhesabu matokeo na kuhifadhi bila mtandao.
sw.results.no_selection_hint: Anzisha tathmini mpya au fungua matokeo yaliyohifadhiwa kutoka historia.
sw.results.latest_assessment: Matokeo ya tathmini ya hivi karibuni
sw.results.drivers_none: Hakuna vichochezi vya hatari vya uzito mkubwa vilivyotambuliwa katika tathmini hii.
sw.results.disclaimer: MycoGuard hutoa uchunguzi wa hatari, si upimaji wa maabara. Daima tupa nafaka yenye ukungu kutoka kwenye minyororo ya chakula na malisho. Usichome nyenzo zilizoathirika. Fuata mwongozo wa afya ya umma wa kaunti.
sw.history.title: Historia ya tathmini bila mtandao
sw.history.description: Matokeo yaliyohifadhiwa yanabaki kwenye kifaa hiki kupitia hifadhi ya ndani ili watumiaji waweze kufungua tena baadaye bila hitaji la seva.
sw.history.empty: Hakuna tathmini zilizohifadhiwa bado. Kamilisha tathmini mpya kuunda rekodi ya kwanza bila mtandao.
sw.settings.title: Mipangilio
sw.settings.description: Mipangilio inahifadhiwa kwenye kifaa hiki. MycoGuard haihitaji akaunti.
sw.settings.language_hint: Badilisha kati ya Kiingereza na Kiswahili kwa maswali ya tathmini na vidokezo muhimu.
sw.settings.clear_confirm: Futa tathmini zote zilizohifadhiwa kutoka kwenye kifaa hiki? Kitendo hiki hakiwezi kutenduliwa.
sw.weather.title: Hali ya hewa (bila mtandao)
sw.weather.description: Huu si utabiri wa moja kwa moja. Ni chombo cha nje ya mtandao: chagua hali ya hewa unayoona sasa na MycoGuard itaonyesha hatua za kuzuia zinazopunguza unyevu, ukungu, na hatari ya kuloweka tena.
sw.weather.select_prompt: Chagua hali iliyotazamwa hapo juu kuona bango la hatari na mbinu zinazopendekezwa.
sw.weather.seasonal_hint: Tumia hii kwa majadiliano ya mipango wakati wa ziara za ugani, mikutano ya ushirika, na mafunzo ya kaunti.
sw.weather.ics_description: Hamisha faili ya kalenda kuweka vikumbusho kwenye simu yako. Inafanya kazi bila mtandao.
sw.drying.title: Orodha ya vituo vya ukaushaji
sw.drying.description: Orodha ya kusoma tu kutoka kwa mkusanyo wa data uliothibitishwa. Ukiwa bila mtandao, bado unaweza kusoma viingilio; kufungua kiungo cha chanzo kunahitaji muunganisho.
sw.group.title: Njia ya mwezeshaji wa kikundi
sw.group.description: Fanya uchunguzi mfuatano wakati wa mkutano wa kikundi cha wakulima au mafunzo. Kila tathmini ya mshiriki inaweza kuhifadhiwa kwenye kifaa hiki na kuhamishwa kama muhtasari.
sw.group.session_placeholder: Mfano, shule ya shamba PELUM, ziara ya Juni
sw.group.participant_hint: Tumia kitambulisho kifupi (jina, kijiji, au namba). Hiki kinabaki kwenye kifaa isipokuwa kihamishwe.
sw.group.summary_hint: Muhtasari ni wa jedwali kwa majadiliano ya haraka na kuripoti.
sw.group.empty: Hakuna tathmini za kikundi zilizohifadhiwa bado.
